fields.title: Facing
fields.description: The direction the block parts are placed starting from 'minecraft:multi_block_part' permutation '0' to permutation 'parts'. Default value is 'up'.

fields.title: Enabled States
fields.description: Which state to enable. Must specify at least one. Options: ["minecraft:multi_block_part"].

fields.title: Parts
fields.description: The number of block parts, this sets the value for state 'minecraft:multi_block_part'. Default value is '2'.

description: Adds the "minecraft:multi_block_part" state and multi block functionality to the block.
title: Block Multi Block
